cases.title: Organizer Admin uploads cover image to draft event via POST /events/{eventId}/cover-image
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Draft event owned by organizer's organizing unit
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with image file and OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with organizer or public read token per endpoint policy
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 or 201; event row persists cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at; GET event detail includes non-null coverImageUrl pointing to controlled media path; satisfies FR-35 organizer upload during create/edit lifecycle

cases.title: Organizer Admin replaces existing cover image with new upload
preconditions: Event already has cover_image_key from prior OrganizerAdmin upload in Postgres
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope on event
Second valid image file (different content) under 5 MB
Integration test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: Record current coverImageUrl and cover_image_key from GET /events/{eventId} and events table
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with replacement file via media service/repository
Query events row and media storage for new key and file bytes
cases.expected: cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at update atomically in database; coverImageUrl changes; new media endpoint serves replacement bytes; prior key superseded or removed per storage policy; FR-35 replace semantics honored

cases.title: Organizer Admin removes cover via DELETE /events/{eventId}/cover-image during edit
preconditions: Event with existing cover_image_key set by OrganizerAdmin
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope on event
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
Query events row for cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at
cases.expected: DELETE succeeds; cover_image_key cleared in database; GET detail omits coverImageUrl or returns null; single-image-per-event metadata removed per stakeholders scope

cases.title: Organizer Admin selects cover via file picker with preview on create/edit event form
preconditions: Web app running with organizer event create/edit form per page-list §Organizer Admin Event management
OrganizerAdmin logged in
Valid image file for file picker
steps: Navigate to create event form (or edit existing draft event)
Use file picker to select a cover image
Observe inline preview before or after save
Submit form or trigger upload and confirm persistence
cases.expected: Form exposes file picker, preview, replace, and remove per page-list create/edit spec; selected image preview renders; upload completes and cover persists on event; FR-35 upload during create/edit UI flow satisfied

cases.title: Organizer Admin replaces and removes cover from edit form controls
preconditions: Existing draft or editable event with uploaded cover image
OrganizerAdmin on event edit form with replace and remove controls
steps: Open edit form for event with existing cover; confirm current preview
Select a different image via file picker to replace cover
Save or upload replacement and confirm updated preview
Use remove control to delete cover and save
cases.expected: Replace updates preview and persisted coverImageUrl; remove clears cover and form shows empty/neutral state; replace and remove actions available per page-list create/edit form spec

cases.title: Cover upload allowed on published event edit (not only draft create)
preconditions: Published event owned by OrganizerAdmin organizing unit
OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image on published event
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 or 201; cover_image_key persisted during edit of non-draft event; FR-35 covers both create and edit contexts

cases.title: Cover upload rejects disallowed MIME types before persistence
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Non-image file (e.g. application/pdf or text/plain) presented as upload
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file type
Query events row for cover_image_key
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; cover_image_key remains null or unchanged; no file stored under uploads path; only image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp accepted per API design §2.7 and NFR-18

cases.title: Cover upload rejects files exceeding 5 MB maximum size
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Valid MIME image file larger than 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with oversized file as multipart upload
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with stable invalid-input error code; no cover_image_key persisted; event detail coverImageUrl unchanged if prior cover absent

cases.title: Uploaded cover stored under controlled path and served via GET /media/events/{key}
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
UPLOADS_DIR configured per local development setup
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image and capture cover_image_key from response or subsequent GET
GET /api/v1/media/events/{key} with valid key
Verify file exists under configured uploads directory
cases.expected: File persisted under configured uploads directory; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type; no direct raw filesystem URL exposure per NFR-18

cases.title: Participant cannot upload or delete cover image (OrganizerAdmin only)
preconditions: Editable event in organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT and separate participant JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerAdmin token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with participant token only
DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with participant token only
cases.expected: OrganizerAdmin mutating requests succeed; participant-only mutating requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; sensitive media mutation gated per NFR-07 and NFR-08

cases.title: Unauthenticated cover upload returns 401
preconditions: Existing event eligible for cover upload
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no cover_image_key written; consistent typed error envelope with requestId

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot upload or delete cover image (create/edit restricted to OrganizerAdmin)
preconditions: Editable event in staff-assigned scope
Valid OrganizerStaff JWT (no create/edit event draft permission per roles-permissions matrix)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerStaff token and valid image file
DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerStaff token on event with existing cover
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized for both POST and DELETE; no cover_image_key change; FR-35 actor is Organizer Admin only and Staff lacks create/edit event draft capability

cases.title: Invalid MIME type upload rejected before persistence
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Non-image file (e.g. image/gif or application/pdf) presented as upload
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file type
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; cover_image_key remains null or unchanged; no file stored under uploads path

cases.title: Cover upload for event outside OrganizerAdmin scope returns 403 or 404
preconditions: Event owned by organizing unit A
OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped only to unit B
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as unit B admin with valid image file
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per roles-permissions scope rules; no cover_image_key change on target event

cases.title: Cover upload at exactly 5 MB boundary accepted; just over 5 MB rejected
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Fixtures: valid WebP at 5_000_000 bytes and at 5_000_001 bytes
steps: POST cover-image with 5 MB file
DELETE cover-image to reset
POST cover-image with 5 MB + 1 byte file
cases.expected: At-limit file uploads successfully with HTTP 200 or 201; over-limit file returns HTTP 400; boundary enforced consistently per API max 5 MB contract

cases.title: DELETE cover-image on event without cover is idempotent or returns clear not-found
preconditions: Event with cover_image_key null
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
cases.expected: DELETE returns success or stable 404 without error side effects; event remains without coverImageUrl; no orphan storage writes

cases.title: Media route rejects path traversal attempts for cover keys
preconditions: API server running with media handler
No valid cover uploaded for traversal key
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/../etc/passwd or similar traversal variant
GET /api/v1/media/events/nonexistent-key
cases.expected: Path traversal and invalid keys rejected with HTTP 404 or 400; no arbitrary filesystem read; storage confined to configured uploads directory per NFR-18

cases.title: Malformed multipart cover upload rejected at API validation gate
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Multipart request with missing file part or unsupported Content-Type on file field
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with empty multipart body
POST with file field but unsupported or missing Content-Type declaration
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; no cover_image_key persisted; malformed uploads cannot bypass NFR-18 MIME validation gate
